german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of positions remain accessible without German language proficiency.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Technical Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Technical PM roles, highlighting a concentration in generalist positions.

seniority.title: Hiring is spread across multiple levels
seniority.subtitle: No single seniority group clearly dominates the current market.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees still prefer on-site work over hybrid and remote arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with limited remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 35% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 32% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Notable Diversity and Balance
industry.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating potential accessibility constraints.
